title: zLife Season 1
description:
This is a Life-Series inspired datapack/mod

All players start with a random amount of lives and one heart. 

Can you survive with friends? Or will your world fall into bloodshed?
body: Start with 1 heart and 7–13 lives. On death: lose 1 life, gain 1 heart. On kill: gain 1 life. Name color shows lives: Red (1–3), Yellow (4–6), Lime (7–9), Dark Green (10+). Run out of lives = elimination.
